name: Mini Morsel Shortbread Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a large mixing bowl, beat the butter and sugar together until creamy.
3. Beat in the egg and vanilla extract.
4. Gradually add the flour to the mixture.
5. Stir in 1 cup of mini chocolate chips.
6. Spread the batter evenly into an ungreased 13 x 9-inch pan.
7. Bake for 30 to 33 minutes, or until the top begins to brown.
8. Immediately sprinkle the remaining 1 cup of mini chocolate chips over the top.
9. Let stand for 5 minutes, or until the chips become shiny and soft.
10. Spread the chocolate evenly over the top.
11. Cool for 10 minutes.
12. While still warm, cut into 1 1/4 inch squares.
13. Allow to cool completely.
Makes about 3 dozen.
